leadCapture.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid notification email address
leadCapture.saveError: Failed to save lead capture settings
leadCapture.title: Lead Capture Form
leadCapture.description: Show an inline form after the first message to capture visitor contact info and qualify leads with follow-up questions.
leadCapture.enableDescription: Show a form before the first AI response to collect visitor info
leadCapture.qualifyingDescription: Ask these questions after the form. Mandatory questions must be answered to qualify the lead.
leadCapture.question: Question
leadCapture.questionPlaceholder: e.g. How many employees does your company have?
leadCapture.mandatoryDescription: Lead must give a qualifying answer to be marked as qualified
leadCapture.qualifiedResponseHelp: Describe what counts as a qualifying answer. Leave blank to accept any answer.
leadCapture.alternateQuestion1Placeholder: e.g. How many people are on your team? (asked if user cannot answer directly)
leadCapture.alternateQuestion1Help: An alternate way to ask the same question if the user cannot or will not answer directly
leadCapture.alternateQuestion2Placeholder: e.g. Could you give a rough headcount? (asked if alternate question 1 also does not work)
leadCapture.alternateQuestion2Help: A second rephrasing used if alternate question 1 also does not get an answer
leadCapture.notificationEmailHelp: Receive notifications when new leads are captured
leadCapture.enableNotificationsHelp: Send email when a new lead is captured

publicPage.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.

publicPage.logoSizeError: Logo must be smaller than 2 MB.
publicPage.logoUploadError: Logo upload failed. Try a smaller image, or check storage permissions.
publicPage.title: Public page
publicPage.description: A shareable, hosted home for this agent, no website required.
publicPage.slugHelp: Cosmetic label. The URL stays unique via the agent ID, so any name is fine.
publicPage.logoHelp: Defaults to a monogram. Upload a custom image anytime.
publicPage.welcomeDescription: The greeting visitors see before they ask anything.
publicPage.headline: Headline
publicPage.appearanceDescription: Theme and accent color applied across the page.
publicPage.promptCardsDescription: Titled topic cards shown on the welcome screen.

handoff.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
handoff.title: Human Handoff
handoff.description: Allow customers to connect with human agents when AI cannot help
handoff.enableDescription: Allow customers to request or be connected to human agents
handoff.triggerModeHelp: Choose how handoff can be initiated
handoff.lowConfidenceHelp: Trigger when AI confidence is below threshold
handoff.keywordDetectionHelp: Trigger when customer uses specific phrases
handoff.keywordsPlaceholder: speak to human, talk to agent, human please
handoff.customerRequestDetectionHelp: AI detects when customer wants human help
handoff.showHumanButtonHelp: Display button in widget for customer to request agent
handoff.enableBusinessHoursHelp: Only allow handoff during specified hours
handoff.assignmentModeHelp: How conversations are assigned to agents
handoff.queueMessageHelp: Shown while customer waits. Use '{position}' for queue position.
handoff.agentJoinedMessageHelp: Shown when agent connects. Use '{agent_name}' for agent name.

defaults.offlineMessage: Our team is currently offline. Please leave your email and we will get back to you soon.
defaults.queueMessage: Please wait while we connect you with an agent. You are number '{position}' in the queue.

embed.title: Embed
embed.subtitle: Customize and install your website chat widget.
embed.embedDescription: Add this code to your website to display the chat widget
embed.pasteBeforeBody: Paste this code just before the closing '</body>' tag
embed.domainWhitelistDescription: Restrict which websites can embed your chat widget. Leave empty to allow all domains.
embed.invalidDomain: Invalid domain format. Example: example.com or *.example.com
embed.domainsUpdated: Domain whitelist updated ({count} {count, plural, one {domain} other {domains}})
embed.domainHelp: Use *.example.com to allow all subdomains. Only localhost is always allowed.
embed.restrictedStatus: Widget restricted to {count} {count, plural, one {domain} other {domains}}
embed.openStatus: Widget can be embedded on any domain
embed.mobileSdkDescription: Publishable client keys for native mobile apps built on the FrontFace SDK. Safe to ship in an app binary; revoke any time. Hand a key (and this project ID) to your app developer.
embed.noMobileKeys: No mobile keys yet. Generate one to hand to your app developer.
embed.previewKeyOwnerWarning: A project owner must create the widget preview key.
embed.imageTypeError: Image must be a PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF file.
embed.imageSizeError: Image must be smaller than 2 MB.
embed.imageUploadError: Image upload failed. Try a smaller image or check permissions.
embed.widgetSubtitle: Customize your chat widget and embed it on any website
embed.noKnowledgeWarning: Your agent has no knowledge base. Add content before embedding, or the widget will not be able to answer questions.
embed.previewSavedHelp: Saved appearance changes are loaded from the agent widget configuration.
embed.previewSampleCopy: This is a live preview with your actual chatbot. Click the chat bubble to test it!
embed.usePrimaryForLauncherHelp: Off lets you set a separate bubble color
embed.imageHelp: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF, max 2 MB
embed.noticePlaceholder: e.g. Holiday hours: replies may be delayed
embed.defaultLanguageHelp: Falls back to this when the visitor browser language is not available.
embed.noChannels: No channels configured. Add one to show contact buttons on the widget.
embed.embedInstallHelp: Paste this just before the closing '</body>' tag. Appearance is read from your saved settings, so future changes do not require replacing this snippet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.selectAgentFirst: Please select or create an agent first.
settings.agentDescription: Describe what you want your agent to do
settings.agentDescriptionPlaceholder: Answer support questions, help troubleshoot issues, and guide customers through common problems
settings.widgetIdHelp: Use this ID when embedding the chat widget on your website.
settings.apiKeyDescription: Generate an API key to connect AI tools like Cursor, Claude Code, or Windsurf to manage your chatbot. This key provides access to all your projects.
settings.regenerateConfirm: This will revoke your existing API key and generate a new one. Any integrations using the old key will stop working. Continue?
settings.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke your API key? Any MCP integrations will stop working.
settings.apiKeyGenerated: API key generated successfully. Copy it now - it will not be shown again!
settings.copyApiKeyNow: Copy your API key now. It will not be shown again!
settings.mcpDescription: Connect AI tools like Cursor, Claude Code, or Windsurf to manage your chatbot using natural language.
settings.mcpGenerateFirst: Generate an API key above first.
settings.mcpCopyError: Generate an API key first to copy MCP config
settings.importantCopy: Copy the config now with your full API key included. After dismissing, only the key prefix will be shown.
settings.mcpTipText: Try saying "Add FAQ content about returns and shipping to my chatbot" in Cursor or Claude Code!
settings.widgetStatusDescription: Emergency control to instantly hide the chat widget from your website. Use this if you need to quickly disable the chatbot.
settings.widgetActiveDescription: Visitors can see and use the chat widget
settings.widgetDisabledDescription: Widget is hidden from all visitors
settings.widgetHiddenWarning: The chat widget is currently hidden from your website visitors.
settings.widgetDisabledSuccess: Widget disabled - visitors will not see the chat widget
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will delete all knowledge sources, API endpoints, and chat history for this agent. This action cannot be undone.
settings.leadCaptureAfterFirst: Show a form after the first AI response to collect visitor info
settings.leadQuestionDescription: After the form, your AI agent will ask these questions one by one in the chat
settings.question1Placeholder: e.g. What is your team size?
settings.question2Placeholder: e.g. How did you hear about us?
settings.question3Placeholder: e.g. What problem are you looking to solve?
settings.handoffDescription: Allow customers to connect with human agents when AI cannot help
settings.deleteDescription: Once you delete this agent, all knowledge sources, API endpoints, and chat history will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

presetsList.supportPrompt: You are a helpful customer support agent. Answer support questions, help troubleshoot issues, and guide customers through common problems. Be friendly, patient, and thorough in your responses. If you do not know the answer, offer to connect the customer with a human agent.
presetsList.salesPrompt: You are a knowledgeable sales assistant. Help potential customers understand our products and services, answer questions about pricing and features, and guide them toward solutions that fit their needs. Be persuasive but honest, and focus on understanding customer requirements before making recommendations.
presetsList.shoppingPrompt: You are a friendly shopping assistant. Help customers find products, compare options, check availability, and answer questions about orders and shipping. Provide personalized recommendations based on customer preferences and help them make informed purchasing decisions.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Your chatbot uses this content to answer questions from your customers.
knowledge.subtitleManage: Upload and manage your chatbot knowledge sources
knowledge.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this knowledge source? This action cannot be undone.
knowledge.emptyDescription: Add your FAQs, product info, or documentation to help your chatbot answer customer questions accurately.

modal.title: Add Knowledge
modal.description: Add content that your chatbot will use to answer questions.
modal.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please select a {type} file.
modal.qaRequired: Both a question and an answer are required
modal.question: Question
modal.questionPlaceholder: e.g., Do you offer a free trial?
modal.answerPlaceholder: The answer your agent should give
modal.pdfNote: Note: Scanned PDFs (images) are not supported. The PDF must contain actual text.

apiEndpoints.title: API Endpoints
apiEndpoints.subtitle: Connect APIs so your chatbot can fetch real-time data like order status or inventory.
apiEndpoints.subtitleShort: Connect APIs so your chatbot can fetch real-time data
apiEndpoints.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API endpoint? This action cannot be undone.
apiEndpoints.emptyDescription: Add your external APIs so the chatbot can fetch real-time data like order status, inventory, or pricing.

modal.description: Configure an external API that your chatbot can call to fetch real-time data.
modal.saveBeforeTesting: Please save the endpoint first before testing
modal.name: Name
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Get order status and tracking information. Use when customer asks about their order, shipping, or delivery. Requires order_id parameter.
modal.descriptionHelp: Describe when the AI should call this API. Be specific about what parameters are needed.
modal.urlHelp: Use '{param}' for values the AI will extract from the conversation.
modal.keepExistingKey: Leave blank to keep existing key
modal.headerHelp: The header name to send the API key in (default: X-API-Key)
modal.keepExistingToken: Leave blank to keep existing token

* (all pages)
